flags.message: The event was formed from docket entry 16, which is itself the court's response to the underlying motion (entry 15): 'No action will be taken on filing... appears intended for another court.' The provisioned baseline therefore already states the court's disposition-in-fact, leaving essentially no forward uncertainty for predictors — the residual question is only how the outcome labeler buckets a clerk-level 'no action' notation (I predicted 'other'). Consider forming motion events from the motion's own docket entry rather than from the responsive entry, and/or defining the label mapping for no-action notations.
